title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
